reflection.episodic_summary: The agent attempted to retrieve an HbA1C value for patient S0789363 but failed to locate it. It then proceeded to order a new test. The episode was marked incorrect because the agent failed to perform an exhaustive search of the lab history before concluding the data was missing, potentially skipping relevant records or misinterpreting the search scope.
reflection.failure_analysis: The agent failed to perform a comprehensive search across all available lab history tools, prematurely assuming the value was missing and triggering an unnecessary state-changing action (ordering a test).
action_guidelines: [P1] Perform exhaustive search across all relevant clinical history tools before declaring data absence.
[P1] Do not initiate state-changing actions based on 'missing data' until confirming the search parameters (e.g., date ranges, test codes) were sufficiently broad.
[P1] Explicitly document the search parameters used when reporting that clinical data could not be retrieved.
